_comment: 原創翻譯層：上游模組自帶 EN 文本但 As1 未收錄的鍵。人工真相檔（手編或工作流生成後人工審核）。
_usage: schema：entries.<檔名>.<鍵> = {en, ch, cn}。en=擷取當時上游原文（供過時比對）；ch=直寫繁中（不經 OpenCC）；cn=對應簡中。與 As1 同鍵時 As1 優先，build 會提示退役該條目。

Fluid_Name_CapriSun_PacificCooler.ch: 果倍爽太平洋酷樂飲料
Fluid_Name_CapriSun_PacificCooler.cn: 果倍爽太平洋酷乐饮料

IGUI_PhunZones_Building_tooltip.en: Untick to explicitly forbid building items like walls and such in zone
IGUI_PhunZones_Building_tooltip.ch: 取消勾選以明確禁止在此區域建造牆壁等建築物件
IGUI_PhunZones_Building_tooltip.cn: 取消勾选以明确禁止在此区域建造墙壁等建筑物件

IGUI_PhunZones_Destruction_tooltip.en: Untick to explicitly forbid using a sledgehammer or dissasembly in zone
IGUI_PhunZones_Destruction_tooltip.ch: 取消勾選以明確禁止在此區域使用大鐵鎚破壞或拆除
IGUI_PhunZones_Destruction_tooltip.cn: 取消勾选以明确禁止在此区域使用大锤破坏或拆除

IGUI_PhunZones_Enabled_tooltip.en: Uncheck to deactivate this zone (and any of its sub zones)
IGUI_PhunZones_Enabled_tooltip.ch: 取消勾選以停用此區域（及其所有子區域）
IGUI_PhunZones_Enabled_tooltip.cn: 取消勾选以停用此区域（及其所有子区域）

IGUI_PhunZones_Fire_tooltip.en: Untick to explicitly forbid fire from spreading in zone. Note that animations may show briefly, but will quickly fizzle out and no damage will occur
IGUI_PhunZones_Fire_tooltip.ch: 取消勾選以明確禁止火勢在此區域蔓延。注意：可能會短暫顯示火焰動畫，但很快就會熄滅，且不會造成任何傷害
IGUI_PhunZones_Fire_tooltip.cn: 取消勾选以明确禁止火势在此区域蔓延。注意：可能会短暂显示火焰动画，但很快就会熄灭，且不会造成任何伤害

IGUI_PhunZones_Mods_tooltip.en: Mods that are required to be activated for this zone to be active. You can add multiple mods by separating each with a semi-colon
IGUI_PhunZones_Mods_tooltip.ch: 啟用此區域所需的模組。可用分號分隔以加入多個模組
IGUI_PhunZones_Mods_tooltip.cn: 启用此区域所需的模组。可用分号分隔以添加多个模组

IGUI_PhunZones_NoBuild.en: You cannot build in this area
IGUI_PhunZones_NoBuild.ch: 你不能在這個區域建造
IGUI_PhunZones_NoBuild.cn: 你不能在这个区域建造

IGUI_PhunZones_Pickup_tooltip.en: Untick to explicitly forbid picking up objects like TV here
IGUI_PhunZones_Pickup_tooltip.ch: 取消勾選以明確禁止在此處撿起電視等物件
IGUI_PhunZones_Pickup_tooltip.cn: 取消勾选以明确禁止在此处拾取电视等物件

IGUI_PhunZones_Placing_tooltip.en: Untick to explicitly forbid placing items like TV's and suck in zone
IGUI_PhunZones_Placing_tooltip.ch: 取消勾選以明確禁止在此區域放置電視等物品
IGUI_PhunZones_Placing_tooltip.cn: 取消勾选以明确禁止在此区域放置电视等物品

IGUI_PhunZones_Players_tooltip.en: Untick to explicitly prevent players from entering this zone
IGUI_PhunZones_Players_tooltip.ch: 取消勾選以明確禁止玩家進入此區域
IGUI_PhunZones_Players_tooltip.cn: 取消勾选以明确禁止玩家进入此区域

IGUI_PhunZones_RVInteriors_tooltip.en: Tick to flag that this zone inherits its values from wherever the car is at (requires RVInteriors mod)
IGUI_PhunZones_RVInteriors_tooltip.ch: 勾選以標記此區域會繼承車輛目前所在位置的數值（需要 RVInteriors 模組）
IGUI_PhunZones_RVInteriors_tooltip.cn: 勾选以标记此区域会继承车辆当前所在位置的数值（需要 RVInteriors 模组）

IGUI_PhunZones_Safehouse_tooltip.en: Untick to explicitly forbid safehouse creation in zone
IGUI_PhunZones_Safehouse_tooltip.ch: 取消勾選以明確禁止在此區域建立安全屋
IGUI_PhunZones_Safehouse_tooltip.cn: 取消勾选以明确禁止在此区域创建安全屋

IGUI_PhunZones_Scrap_tooltip.en: Untick to explicitly forbid scrapping objects (eg furniture) here
IGUI_PhunZones_Scrap_tooltip.ch: 取消勾選以明確禁止在此處回收拆解物件（例如家具）
IGUI_PhunZones_Scrap_tooltip.cn: 取消勾选以明确禁止在此处回收拆解物件（例如家具）

Print_Media_DixieGasCoke_info.en: <type:parent, width:1240, height:1754><type:texture, x:0, y:0, texture:getTexture("media/textures/printMedia/FlyerPics/DixieGasCoke.png"), width:1240, height:1754>
Print_Media_DixieGasCoke_info.ch: <type:parent, width:1240, height:1754><type:texture, x:0, y:0, texture:getTexture("media/textures/printMedia/FlyerPics/DixieGasCoke.png"), width:1240, height:1754>
Print_Media_DixieGasCoke_info.cn: <type:parent, width:1240, height:1754><type:texture, x:0, y:0, texture:getTexture("media/textures/printMedia/FlyerPics/DixieGasCoke.png"), width:1240, height:1754>

Print_Media_DixieGasCoke_title.ch: 迪克西加油站可口可樂廣告
Print_Media_DixieGasCoke_title.cn: 迪克西加油站可口可乐广告

Print_Media_ListerineConvenience_info.en: <type:parent, width:1240, height:1754><type:texture, x:0, y:0, texture:getTexture("media/textures/printMedia/FlyerPics/ListerineConvenience.png"), width:1240, height:1754>
Print_Media_ListerineConvenience_info.ch: <type:parent, width:1240, height:1754><type:texture, x:0, y:0, texture:getTexture("media/textures/printMedia/FlyerPics/ListerineConvenience.png"), width:1240, height:1754>
Print_Media_ListerineConvenience_info.cn: <type:parent, width:1240, height:1754><type:texture, x:0, y:0, texture:getTexture("media/textures/printMedia/FlyerPics/ListerineConvenience.png"), width:1240, height:1754>

Print_Text_DixieGasCoke_info.en: Stop by on your next trip out of, or into Louisville and grab a nice cold refreshing glass bottle Coca Cola.
Print_Text_DixieGasCoke_info.ch: 下次進出路易維爾時，順道來一瓶冰涼暢快的玻璃瓶裝可口可樂吧。
Print_Text_DixieGasCoke_info.cn: 下次进出路易维尔时，顺路来一瓶冰凉畅快的玻璃瓶装可口可乐吧。

Print_Text_DixieGasCoke_title.ch: 迪克西加油站供應可口可樂
Print_Text_DixieGasCoke_title.cn: 迪克西加油站供应可口可乐

Print_Text_ListerineConvenience_info.en: Whether you keep it in your car glovebox or in your back pocket, Listerine keeps your mouth minty fresh for ANYTHING!
Print_Text_ListerineConvenience_info.ch: 不管是放在車上的置物箱還是後口袋，李施德霖都能讓你的口氣保持薄荷清新，隨時應付任何場合！
Print_Text_ListerineConvenience_info.cn: 不管是放在车上的储物箱还是后口袋，李施德林都能让你的口气保持薄荷清新，随时应付任何场合！

Print_Text_ListerineConvenience_title.ch: 李施德霖讓你口氣薄荷清新！
Print_Text_ListerineConvenience_title.cn: 李施德林让你口气薄荷清新！

Sandbox_Bandits.GroupSizeMax_tooltip.en: Maximum number of bandits to spawn

Sandbox_Bandits.GroupSizeMin_tooltip.en: Minimum number of bandits to spawn

Sandbox_Bandits.Loadout_tooltip.en: NPCs from this wave will select weapons from the following table.
Sandbox_Bandits.Loadout_tooltip.ch: 此波次的 NPC 將從以下表格中選取武器。
Sandbox_Bandits.Loadout_tooltip.cn: 此波次的 NPC 将从以下表格中选取武器。

Sandbox_Bandits.RandomAmmo_tooltip.en: Minimum amount of spare magazines carried if random ammo enabled
Sandbox_Bandits.RandomAmmo_tooltip.ch: 啟用隨機彈藥時攜帶備用彈匣的最少數量
Sandbox_Bandits.RandomAmmo_tooltip.cn: 启用随机弹药时携带备用弹匣的最少数量

Sandbox_Bandits.RandomHealthMax_tooltip.en: Maximum value for random health if enabled. Higher values may produce unexpected results
Sandbox_Bandits.RandomHealthMax_tooltip.ch: 啟用隨機生命值時的最大值。數值過高可能產生非預期的結果
Sandbox_Bandits.RandomHealthMax_tooltip.cn: 启用随机生命值时的最大值。数值过高可能产生意外结果

Sandbox_Bandits.RandomHealthMin_tooltip.en: Minimum value for random health if enabled
Sandbox_Bandits.RandomHealthMin_tooltip.ch: 啟用隨機生命值時的最小值
Sandbox_Bandits.RandomHealthMin_tooltip.cn: 启用随机生命值时的最小值

Sandbox_Bandits.SpecialWeapons_tooltip.en: Some loadouts may feature special weapons (automatics, machine guns). Choose how likely they are to appear.
Sandbox_Bandits.SpecialWeapons_tooltip.ch: 部分裝備配置可能包含特殊武器（全自動武器、機槍）。選擇它們出現的機率。
Sandbox_Bandits.SpecialWeapons_tooltip.cn: 部分装备配置可能包含特殊武器（全自动武器、机枪）。选择它们出现的几率。

Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.AllowGore.ch: 顯示血腥/傷勢視覺效果
Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.AllowGore.cn: 显示血腥/伤势视觉效果

Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.AllowRaiders.ch: 允許襲擊者 AI (永遠找得到玩家)
Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.AllowRaiders.cn: 允许袭击者 AI (总能找到玩家)

Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.BaseSpawnRadi.ch: 玩家基地最小生成半徑
Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.BaseSpawnRadi.cn: 玩家基地最小生成半径

Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.BaseSpawnRadi.en: Define a radius around a player base that bandits cannot spawn inside. Recommended to keep low if playing Week One
Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.BaseSpawnRadi.ch: 設定玩家基地周圍的半徑範圍，土匪不會在此範圍內生成。若遊玩「第一週」模式建議保持低數值
Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.BaseSpawnRadi.cn: 设定玩家基地周围的半径范围，土匪不会在此范围内生成。若游玩“第一周”模式建议保持低数值

Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.DefenderCoold.ch: 造訪過的建築被佔據所需天數
Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.DefenderCoold.cn: 造访过的建筑被占据所需天数

Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.DefenderCoold.en: How many days before any building you've visited for more than 10 minutes of game time can be occupied by defenders
Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.DefenderCoold.ch: 你在遊戲時間內停留超過 10 分鐘的建築，需經過多少天後才可能被守衛者佔據
Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.DefenderCoold.cn: 你在游戏时间内停留超过 10 分钟的建筑，需经过多少天后才可能被守卫者占据

Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.GeneratorSett.ch: 土匪安全屋配有發電機
Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.GeneratorSett.cn: 土匪安全屋配有发电机

Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.GeneratorSett.en: Adjust when bandit safehouses will spawn with generators
Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.GeneratorSett.ch: 調整土匪安全屋生成時附帶發電機的時機
Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.GeneratorSett.cn: 调整土匪安全屋生成时附带发电机的时机

Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.Incognito.en: Spawn icons do not show hostility

Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.MeleeBalance_.en: Prevent bandits from performing new melee attacks before their previous one has finished
Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.MeleeBalance_.ch: 防止土匪在上一次近戰攻擊尚未結束前就發動新的近戰攻擊
Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.MeleeBalance_.cn: 防止土匪在上一次近战攻击尚未结束前就发动新的近战攻击

Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.RandomLoot_to.en: Percentage of normal chance for each loot item to spawn, 100 = normal
Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.RandomLoot_to.ch: 每件戰利品生成機率相對於正常值的百分比，100 = 正常
Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.RandomLoot_to.cn: 每件战利品生成几率相对于正常值的百分比，100 = 正常

Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.SpawnMultipli.en: Percentage multiplier for the chance that any NPC group will appear; 50 = half, 100 = normal, 200 = double
Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.SpawnMultipli.ch: 任何 NPC 隊伍出現機率的百分比倍率；50 = 一半，100 = 正常，200 = 兩倍
Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.SpawnMultipli.cn: 任何 NPC 队伍出现几率的百分比倍率；50 = 一半，100 = 正常，200 = 两倍

Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.TimePersists.en: Bandits progress based on world age

Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.VehicleInsert.ch: 土匪生成時播放車輛音效
Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.VehicleInsert.cn: 土匪生成时播放车辆音效

Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.ZoneBoost_too.en: Percentage chance for bandit waves to spawn in forage zones they do not prefer
Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.ZoneBoost_too.ch: 土匪波次在其不偏好的採集區域生成的百分比機率
Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptions.ZoneBoost_too.cn: 土匪波次在其不偏好的采集区域生成的百分比几率

Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptionsDay1.Family_to.ch: 遊戲開始時加入的同伴
Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptionsDay1.Family_to.cn: 游戏开始时加入的同伴

Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptionsWeek1.Trespass.en: Time before you recieve a violent response for trespassing
Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptionsWeek1.Trespass.ch: 擅闖他人領地後遭到武力回擊前的緩衝時間
Sandbox_Bandits_AddOptionsWeek1.Trespass.cn: 擅闯他人领地后遭到武力回击前的缓冲时间

Sandbox_ImprovedFarmingInfoWindow_CheckF.en: Check Crops with Less Than 3 Fertilizer Uses (Yellow Square)
Sandbox_ImprovedFarmingInfoWindow_CheckF.ch: 檢查施肥次數少於 3 次的作物（黃色方框）
Sandbox_ImprovedFarmingInfoWindow_CheckF.cn: 检查施肥次数少于 3 次的作物（黄色方框）

Sandbox_PhunSprintersUI_AddToLoot_toolti.en: If Always Show is disabled, tick this so that Military Issued sensor will appear in loot. Wearing these will show the UI. Requires restart
Sandbox_PhunSprintersUI_AddToLoot_toolti.ch: 若停用「一律顯示」，勾選此項可讓軍用感測器出現在戰利品中。穿戴後即可顯示 UI。需要重新啟動
Sandbox_PhunSprintersUI_AddToLoot_toolti.cn: 若禁用“始终显示”，勾选此项可让军用传感器出现在战利品中。穿戴后即可显示 UI。需要重启

Sandbox_PhunSprintersUI_AlwaysShowElemen.en: Always UI. This requires the PhunSprintersUI mod active. Probably makes sense to disable to moodle option if using this. Requires restart
Sandbox_PhunSprintersUI_AlwaysShowElemen.ch: 一律顯示 UI。需啟用 PhunSprintersUI 模組。使用此選項時建議停用情緒圖示選項。需要重新啟動
Sandbox_PhunSprintersUI_AlwaysShowElemen.cn: 始终显示 UI。需启用 PhunSprintersUI 模组。使用此选项时建议禁用情绪图标选项。需要重启

Sandbox_PhunSprintersUI_ShowRNCToolTip_t.en: If set to true (and you have Rewarding Night Combat mod installed), this will add their tooltip to the moon element, thereby enabling you to remove theirs
Sandbox_PhunSprintersUI_ShowRNCToolTip_t.ch: 若啟用（且已安裝 Rewarding Night Combat 模組），會將其提示加入月亮元件，讓你可以移除該模組原本的提示
Sandbox_PhunSprintersUI_ShowRNCToolTip_t.cn: 若启用（且已安装 Rewarding Night Combat 模组），会将其提示加入月亮元素，让你可以移除该模组原本的提示

Sandbox_PhunSprinters_ShowMoodleOnlyWhen.ch: 僅在有風險時顯示情緒圖示
Sandbox_PhunSprinters_ShowMoodleOnlyWhen.cn: 仅在有风险时显示情绪图标

Sandbox_PhunSprinters_ShowMoodleOnlyWhen.en: Only show moodle when sprinters can spawn
Sandbox_PhunSprinters_ShowMoodleOnlyWhen.ch: 僅在奔跑者可能生成時顯示情緒圖示
Sandbox_PhunSprinters_ShowMoodleOnlyWhen.cn: 仅在奔跑者可能生成时显示情绪图标

Sandbox_PhunSprinters_ShowMoodle_tooltip.en: Show moodle with information about current sprinter risks
Sandbox_PhunSprinters_ShowMoodle_tooltip.ch: 顯示情緒圖示，呈現目前奔跑者風險資訊
Sandbox_PhunSprinters_ShowMoodle_tooltip.cn: 显示情绪图标，呈现当前奔跑者风险信息

Sandbox_PhunSprinters_VersionKey_tooltip.en: Advanced setting. Change to reset zed ModData for some reason or another
Sandbox_PhunSprinters_VersionKey_tooltip.ch: 進階設定。修改此值可視需要重置殭屍的 ModData
Sandbox_PhunSprinters_VersionKey_tooltip.cn: 高级设置。修改此值可视需要重置丧尸的 ModData

Sandbox_PhunZones_LoadDefaults_tooltip.en: Load basic vanilla zones. Untick if you do not want to use the vanilla zones PZ ships with (eg you are using a total custom map)
Sandbox_PhunZones_LoadDefaults_tooltip.ch: 載入基本的原版區域。若不想使用 PZ 內建的原版區域（例如你使用的是完全自訂的地圖），請取消勾選
Sandbox_PhunZones_LoadDefaults_tooltip.cn: 加载基本的原版区域。若不想使用 PZ 自带的原版区域（例如你使用的是完全自定义的地图），请取消勾选

Sandbox_PhunZones_ProcessOnClient_toolti.en: Untick to process client zone location changes on server side (requires server restart)
Sandbox_PhunZones_ProcessOnClient_toolti.ch: 取消勾選以改由伺服器端處理客戶端的區域位置變更（需要重新啟動伺服器）
Sandbox_PhunZones_ProcessOnClient_toolti.cn: 取消勾选以改由服务器端处理客户端的区域位置变更（需要重启服务器）

Sandbox_PhunZones_PvPMode_tooltip.en: Enabled = PvP mode if forced on if player enters a zone with PvP option ticked, Otherwise it gets forced off (default behaviour). Toggle = same as default, but allows player to toggle PvP on/off within PvP areas. Disabled = prevents PhunZones from doing anything with PvP (eg you are managing via another mod)
Sandbox_PhunZones_PvPMode_tooltip.ch: 啟用 = 玩家進入勾選了 PvP 選項的區域時強制開啟 PvP 模式，否則強制關閉（預設行為）。切換 = 與預設相同，但允許玩家在 PvP 區域內自行開關 PvP。停用 = 讓 PhunZones 完全不干涉 PvP（例如你透過其他模組管理）
Sandbox_PhunZones_PvPMode_tooltip.cn: 启用 = 玩家进入勾选了 PvP 选项的区域时强制开启 PvP 模式，否则强制关闭（默认行为）。切换 = 与默认相同，但允许玩家在 PvP 区域内自行开关 PvP。禁用 = 让 PhunZones 完全不干涉 PvP（例如你通过其他模组管理）

Sandbox_PhunZones_ShowZoneChange_tooltip.en: Display the welcome marquee when entering a new zone
Sandbox_PhunZones_ShowZoneChange_tooltip.ch: 進入新區域時顯示歡迎橫幅
Sandbox_PhunZones_ShowZoneChange_tooltip.cn: 进入新区域时显示欢迎横幅

Sandbox_PhunZones_VehicleTracking_toolti.en: Use the location of the last vehicle entered as the players current location. Ideal for RV Interiors
Sandbox_PhunZones_VehicleTracking_toolti.ch: 以玩家最後進入的車輛位置作為玩家目前位置。適合搭配 RV Interiors 使用
Sandbox_PhunZones_VehicleTracking_toolti.cn: 以玩家最后进入的车辆位置作为玩家当前位置。适合搭配 RV Interiors 使用

Sandbox_PhunZones_ZedUpdateFrequency_too.en: The number of seconds between updating zeds with zone information used for removing them and by other mods. The higher the number, the less resource intensive it is
Sandbox_PhunZones_ZedUpdateFrequency_too.ch: 更新喪屍區域資訊的間隔秒數，用於移除喪屍及供其他模組使用。數值越高，資源消耗越低
Sandbox_PhunZones_ZedUpdateFrequency_too.cn: 更新丧尸区域信息的间隔秒数，用于移除丧尸及供其他模组使用。数值越高，资源消耗越低

UI_ShortSighted_Condition.en: The malus can be canceled by wearing glasses
UI_ShortSighted_Condition.ch: 戴上眼鏡可以抵銷此負面效果
UI_ShortSighted_Condition.cn: 戴上眼镜可以抵消此负面效果

UI_mod_eris_food_expiry_require_trait_to.en: When enabled, the Nutritionist trait is required to check freshness.
UI_mod_eris_food_expiry_require_trait_to.ch: 啟用後，需要擁有營養師特質才能查看食物新鮮度。
UI_mod_eris_food_expiry_require_trait_to.cn: 启用后，需要拥有营养师特质才能查看食物新鲜度。

UI_moredesc_options_Tooltip_ShowForaging.en: If checked, will add foraging stats to the traits and professions descriptions
UI_moredesc_options_Tooltip_ShowForaging.ch: 若勾選，將在特質與職業描述中加入覓食數據
UI_moredesc_options_Tooltip_ShowForaging.cn: 若勾选，将在特质与职业描述中加入觅食数据

UI_moredesc_options_Tooltip_ShowFreeReci.en: If checked, will add foraging free recipes to the traits and professions descriptions
UI_moredesc_options_Tooltip_ShowFreeReci.ch: 若勾選，將在特質與職業描述中加入免費配方
UI_moredesc_options_Tooltip_ShowFreeReci.cn: 若勾选，将在特质与职业描述中加入免费配方

UI_moredesc_options_Tooltip_ShowMoreDesc.en: If not checked , no extra description will be added after the vanilla description
UI_moredesc_options_Tooltip_ShowMoreDesc.ch: 若未勾選，將不會在原版描述後附加額外描述
UI_moredesc_options_Tooltip_ShowMoreDesc.cn: 若未勾选，将不会在原版描述后附加额外描述

UI_options_AllowBanditIcons_checkBox_too.en: Icons must also be enabled in Sandbox settings
UI_options_AllowBanditIcons_checkBox_too.ch: 還須在沙盒設定中啟用圖示
UI_options_AllowBanditIcons_checkBox_too.cn: 还须在沙盒设置中启用图标

UI_prof_moredesc_startingregularityexerc.en: Starts with %1 % regularity in all fitness & strength exercises
UI_prof_moredesc_startingregularityexerc.ch: 所有體能與力量鍛鍊的初始規律度為 %1 %
UI_prof_moredesc_startingregularityexerc.cn: 所有健身与力量锻炼的初始规律度为 %1 %

UI_trait_moredesc_HPtoallconstructionsex.en: %1 HP to all constructions except walls
UI_trait_moredesc_HPtoallconstructionsex.ch: 除牆壁外的所有建造物 %1 HP
UI_trait_moredesc_HPtoallconstructionsex.cn: 除墙壁外的所有建造物 %1 HP

UI_trait_moredesc_aftercraftingdoesntret.en: After crafting, doesn't return the used items to their original container
UI_trait_moredesc_aftercraftingdoesntret.ch: 製作完成後，使用過的物品不會放回原本的容器
UI_trait_moredesc_aftercraftingdoesntret.cn: 制作完成后，使用过的物品不会放回原来的容器

UI_trait_moredesc_allwoundshealmuchfaste.en: All other wounds heal much faster
UI_trait_moredesc_allwoundshealmuchfaste.ch: 其他所有傷口癒合速度大幅加快
UI_trait_moredesc_allwoundshealmuchfaste.cn: 其他所有伤口愈合速度大幅加快

UI_trait_moredesc_allwoundshealmuchslowe.en: All other wounds heal much slower
UI_trait_moredesc_allwoundshealmuchslowe.ch: 其他所有傷口癒合速度大幅減慢
UI_trait_moredesc_allwoundshealmuchslowe.cn: 其他所有伤口愈合速度大幅减慢

UI_trait_moredesc_athleticgaincondition.en: Can be gained by training Fitness to level %1
UI_trait_moredesc_athleticgaincondition.ch: 將體格練到 %1 級可獲得
UI_trait_moredesc_athleticgaincondition.cn: 将体格练到 %1 级可获得

UI_trait_moredesc_canbegainedbytrainings.en: Can be gained by training Strength to level %1
UI_trait_moredesc_canbegainedbytrainings.ch: 將力量訓練至 %1 級即可獲得此特質
UI_trait_moredesc_canbegainedbytrainings.cn: 将力量训练至 %1 级即可获得此特质

UI_trait_moredesc_canbelostbytrainingstr.en: Can be lost by training Stength to level %1
UI_trait_moredesc_canbelostbytrainingstr.ch: 將力量訓練至 %1 級即可移除此特質
UI_trait_moredesc_canbelostbytrainingstr.cn: 将力量训练至 %1 级即可移除此特质

UI_trait_moredesc_cannotgainfitnessxptow.en: Cannot gain Fitness XP towards level %1
UI_trait_moredesc_cannotgainfitnessxptow.ch: 無法獲得升往 %1 級的體格經驗
UI_trait_moredesc_cannotgainfitnessxptow.cn: 无法获得升往 %1 级的体格经验

UI_trait_moredesc_cannotgainxptowardsfit.en: Cannot gain Fitness XP towards levels 7 and higher
UI_trait_moredesc_cannotgainxptowardsfit.ch: 無法獲得升往 7 級及以上的體格經驗
UI_trait_moredesc_cannotgainxptowardsfit.cn: 无法获得升往 7 级及以上的体格经验

UI_trait_moredesc_canthearsound.en: Can't hear sound. Radio chatter doesn't appear.
UI_trait_moredesc_canthearsound.ch: 聽不到聲音。無線電對話不會顯示。
UI_trait_moredesc_canthearsound.cn: 听不到声音。无线电对话不会显示。

UI_trait_moredesc_chanceofbeingspottedby.en: %1% chance of being spotted by a zombie

UI_trait_moredesc_chanceofgettingscratch.en: %1% chance of getting scratched/cut by trees

UI_trait_moredesc_chanceofnotbeinginjure.en: %1% chance of not being injured by zombies

UI_trait_moredesc_chancetotripfromlunge.en: %1% chance to trip from getting attacked by lunging zombies
UI_trait_moredesc_chancetotripfromlunge.ch: %1% 機率在被撲擊的殭屍攻擊時絆倒
UI_trait_moredesc_chancetotripfromlunge.cn: %1% 几率在被扑击的丧尸攻击时绊倒

UI_trait_moredesc_chancetotripvaultingfe.en: %1% chance to trip when run/sprint vaulting a low fence or getting attacked by lunging zombies
UI_trait_moredesc_chancetotripvaultingfe.ch: %1% 機率在奔跑/衝刺翻越矮圍欄或被撲擊的殭屍攻擊時絆倒
UI_trait_moredesc_chancetotripvaultingfe.cn: %1% 几率在奔跑/冲刺翻越矮栅栏或被扑击的丧尸攻击时绊倒

UI_trait_moredesc_chancetotripwhilerunva.en: %1% chance to trip while run/sprint vaulting a low fence
UI_trait_moredesc_chancetotripwhilerunva.ch: %1% 機率在奔跑/衝刺翻越矮圍欄時絆倒
UI_trait_moredesc_chancetotripwhilerunva.cn: %1% 几率在奔跑/冲刺翻越矮栅栏时绊倒

UI_trait_moredesc_characterwillstartlosi.en: Character will start losing life if weight is below %1
UI_trait_moredesc_characterwillstartlosi.ch: 體重低於 %1 時角色會開始失去生命值
UI_trait_moredesc_characterwillstartlosi.cn: 体重低于 %1 时角色会开始失去生命值

UI_trait_moredesc_claustrophobic.en: Doesn't get panicked in rooms of %1+ tiles. The smaller the room, the faster the panic increase.
UI_trait_moredesc_claustrophobic.ch: 在 %1 格以上的房間內不會恐慌。房間越小，恐慌上升越快。
UI_trait_moredesc_claustrophobic.cn: 在 %1 格以上的房间内不会恐慌。房间越小，恐慌上升越快。

UI_trait_moredesc_decreasedchanceoffaili.en: Decreased chance to fail climbing a tall fence or wall
UI_trait_moredesc_decreasedchanceoffaili.ch: 降低翻越高柵欄或牆壁失敗的機率
UI_trait_moredesc_decreasedchanceoffaili.cn: 降低翻越高栅栏或墙壁失败的几率

UI_trait_moredesc_decreasedchanceoffallw.en: Decreased chance of falling when bumping into a zombie or survivor
UI_trait_moredesc_decreasedchanceoffallw.ch: 撞到殭屍或倖存者時較不容易跌倒
UI_trait_moredesc_decreasedchanceoffallw.cn: 撞到丧尸或幸存者时更不容易摔倒

UI_trait_moredesc_decreasedchanceofinjur.en: Decreased chance of injury when opening a can without can opener
UI_trait_moredesc_decreasedchanceofinjur.ch: 不用開罐器開罐頭時較不容易受傷
UI_trait_moredesc_decreasedchanceofinjur.cn: 不用开罐器开罐头时更不容易受伤

UI_trait_moredesc_decreasedchancetotripf.en: Decreased chance to trip from getting attacked by lunging zombies
UI_trait_moredesc_decreasedchancetotripf.ch: 被撲擊的殭屍攻擊時較不容易絆倒
UI_trait_moredesc_decreasedchancetotripf.cn: 被扑击的丧尸攻击时更不容易绊倒

UI_trait_moredesc_decreasedchancewoundwh.en: Decreased chance of inury when opening a can without a can opener
UI_trait_moredesc_decreasedchancewoundwh.ch: 降低不用開罐器開罐頭時受傷的機率
UI_trait_moredesc_decreasedchancewoundwh.cn: 降低不用开罐器开罐头时受伤的几率

UI_trait_moredesc_doesnotwakeupwhenreach.en: But does not affect sleep time, so the character will stay asleep after reaching 0 tiredness
UI_trait_moredesc_doesnotwakeupwhenreach.ch: 但不影響睡眠時間，因此疲勞歸零後角色仍會繼續沉睡
UI_trait_moredesc_doesnotwakeupwhenreach.cn: 但不影响睡眠时间，因此疲劳归零后角色仍会继续沉睡

UI_trait_moredesc_doesntpanicfromzombier.ch: 不會因殭屍復活而恐慌
UI_trait_moredesc_doesntpanicfromzombier.cn: 不会因丧尸复活而恐慌

UI_trait_moredesc_doubledendurancelosswh.en: Doubled endurance loss when walking with heavy weight or running, sprinting, dragging corpses
UI_trait_moredesc_doubledendurancelosswh.ch: 負重行走或奔跑、衝刺、拖曳屍體時耐力消耗加倍
UI_trait_moredesc_doubledendurancelosswh.cn: 负重行走或奔跑、冲刺、拖拽尸体时耐力消耗加倍

UI_trait_moredesc_endurancelosswhenrunni.en: %1% endurance loss when running , sprinting , carrying heavy load, or dragging corpses
UI_trait_moredesc_endurancelosswhenrunni.ch: 跑步、衝刺、負重或拖曳屍體時的耐力消耗 %1%
UI_trait_moredesc_endurancelosswhenrunni.cn: 跑步、冲刺、负重或拖拽尸体时的耐力消耗 %1%

UI_trait_moredesc_falldamage.en: %1% fall damage. and slightly increased chance of fracture/deep wound from falling
UI_trait_moredesc_falldamage.ch: %1% 墜落傷害，且墜落造成骨折/深度傷口的機率略微提高
UI_trait_moredesc_falldamage.cn: %1% 坠落伤害，且坠落造成骨折/深度伤口的几率略微提高

UI_trait_moredesc_fitlosecondition.en: Replaced by Athletic when reaching level %1 Fitness
UI_trait_moredesc_fitlosecondition.ch: 體格達到 %1 級時會被「運動健將」取代
UI_trait_moredesc_fitlosecondition.cn: 体格达到 %1 级时会被“运动健将”取代

UI_trait_moredesc_fitlosecondition2.en: Lost if Fitness is below level %1
UI_trait_moredesc_fitlosecondition2.ch: 體格低於 %1 級時失去
UI_trait_moredesc_fitlosecondition2.cn: 体格低于 %1 级时失去

UI_trait_moredesc_foodillnessduration.ch: 食物中毒平均持續時間約 %1%
UI_trait_moredesc_foodillnessduration.cn: 食物中毒平均持续时间约 %1%

UI_trait_moredesc_greatlydecreasedchance.en: Greatly decreased chance of getting scratched/lacerated while walking or running through trees
UI_trait_moredesc_greatlydecreasedchance.ch: 穿越樹叢行走或奔跑時被抓傷/撕裂傷的機率大幅降低
UI_trait_moredesc_greatlydecreasedchance.cn: 穿越树丛行走或奔跑时被抓伤/撕裂伤的几率大幅降低

UI_trait_moredesc_greatlyincreasedchance.en: Greatly increased chance to fail a tall fence climb
UI_trait_moredesc_greatlyincreasedchance.ch: 翻越高柵欄的失敗機率大幅提高
UI_trait_moredesc_greatlyincreasedchance.cn: 翻越高栅栏的失败几率大幅提高

UI_trait_moredesc_highercalorythresholdt.en: Higher calory threshold to gain weight , if current weight %1kg
UI_trait_moredesc_highercalorythresholdt.ch: 若目前體重 %1kg，增重所需的熱量門檻較高
UI_trait_moredesc_highercalorythresholdt.cn: 若当前体重 %1kg，增重所需的热量阈值更高

UI_trait_moredesc_ifusingthenewstealthsy.en: If using the new stealth system :

UI_trait_moredesc_ifusingtheoldstealthsy.en: If using the old stealth system :

UI_trait_moredesc_includingnonpackagedan.ch: 包括無包裝食物與烹煮過的食物。
UI_trait_moredesc_includingnonpackagedan.cn: 包括无包装食物与烹饪过的食物。

UI_trait_moredesc_includingtextonmapsand.en: Including text on maps or calory values on packaged food
UI_trait_moredesc_includingtextonmapsand.ch: 包括地圖上的文字或包裝食品上的熱量標示
UI_trait_moredesc_includingtextonmapsand.cn: 包括地图上的文字或包装食品上的热量标示

UI_trait_moredesc_increasedchanceoffallw.en: Increased chance of falling when bumping into a zombie or survivor
UI_trait_moredesc_increasedchanceoffallw.ch: 撞到殭屍或倖存者時更容易跌倒
UI_trait_moredesc_increasedchanceoffallw.cn: 撞到丧尸或幸存者时更容易摔倒

UI_trait_moredesc_increasedchanceofinjur.en: Increased chance of injury when opening a can without can opener
UI_trait_moredesc_increasedchanceofinjur.ch: 不用開罐器開罐頭時更容易受傷
UI_trait_moredesc_increasedchanceofinjur.cn: 不用开罐器开罐头时更容易受伤

UI_trait_moredesc_increasedchancetofaila.en: Increased chance to fail a tall fence or wall climb
UI_trait_moredesc_increasedchancetofaila.ch: 翻越高柵欄或牆壁的失敗機率提高
UI_trait_moredesc_increasedchancetofaila.cn: 翻越高栅栏或墙壁的失败几率提高

UI_trait_moredesc_increasedchancewoundwh.en: Increased chance of inury when opening a can without a can opener
UI_trait_moredesc_increasedchancewoundwh.ch: 提高不用開罐器開罐頭時受傷的機率
UI_trait_moredesc_increasedchancewoundwh.cn: 提高不用开罐器开罐头时受伤的几率

UI_trait_moredesc_increasedminimumanbian.en: Slightly increased minimum ambient light, except in closed rooms
UI_trait_moredesc_increasedminimumanbian.ch: 最低環境亮度略微提高（封閉房間除外）
UI_trait_moredesc_increasedminimumanbian.cn: 最低环境亮度略微提高（封闭房间除外）

UI_trait_moredesc_inventorytransferblood.en: Inventory transfer of bloody items is faster and causes stress
UI_trait_moredesc_inventorytransferblood.ch: 轉移帶血物品的速度更快，但會產生壓力
UI_trait_moredesc_inventorytransferblood.cn: 转移带血物品的速度更快，但会产生压力

UI_trait_moredesc_lostifweightgoesabove.ch: 體重超過 %1 時失去此特質
UI_trait_moredesc_lostifweightgoesabove.cn: 体重超过 %1 时失去此特质

UI_trait_moredesc_lostifweightgoesbelow.ch: 體重低於 %1 時失去此特質
UI_trait_moredesc_lostifweightgoesbelow.cn: 体重低于 %1 时失去此特质

UI_trait_moredesc_maluscanberemovedbywea.en: The maluses can be canceled by wearing glasses
UI_trait_moredesc_maluscanberemovedbywea.ch: 配戴眼鏡可消除這些負面效果
UI_trait_moredesc_maluscanberemovedbywea.cn: 佩戴眼镜可消除这些负面效果

UI_trait_moredesc_maxrangemodifieronweap.en: %1% max range modifier on weapon sights
UI_trait_moredesc_maxrangemodifieronweap.ch: %1% 武器瞄具最大射程修正
UI_trait_moredesc_maxrangemodifieronweap.cn: %1% 武器瞄具最大射程修正

UI_trait_moredesc_motionsickness.en: (Increases faster the faster the vehicle goes, up to %1% sickness maximum)
UI_trait_moredesc_motionsickness.ch: （載具速度越快增加越快，最高至 %1% 暈車值）
UI_trait_moredesc_motionsickness.cn: （车辆速度越快增加越快，最高至 %1% 晕车值）

UI_trait_moredesc_motionsickness_alloccu.en: Motion sickness affects all vehicle occupants, progressing 50% slower for the driver
UI_trait_moredesc_motionsickness_alloccu.ch: 暈車會影響車上所有乘員，駕駛的累積速度減慢 50%
UI_trait_moredesc_motionsickness_alloccu.cn: 晕车会影响车上所有乘员，驾驶员的累积速度减慢 50%

UI_trait_moredesc_motionsickness_forward.en: Motion sickness occurs when moving both forward and backward, with exponential increase based on speed
UI_trait_moredesc_motionsickness_forward.ch: 前進與倒車時皆會暈車，且隨車速呈指數增加
UI_trait_moredesc_motionsickness_forward.cn: 前进与倒车时均会晕车，且随车速呈指数增加

UI_trait_moredesc_motionsickness_offroad.ch: 越野行駛時 %1% 暈車累積速度
UI_trait_moredesc_motionsickness_offroad.cn: 越野行驶时 %1% 晕车累积速度

UI_trait_moredesc_motionsickness_skidstu.en: Effects are doubled during skids or sharp turns
UI_trait_moredesc_motionsickness_skidstu.ch: 打滑或急轉彎時效果加倍
UI_trait_moredesc_motionsickness_skidstu.cn: 打滑或急转弯时效果翻倍

UI_trait_moredesc_needtosetanalarmtotake.en: Set an alarm every night to take full advantage of the trait
UI_trait_moredesc_needtosetanalarmtotake.ch: 每晚設定鬧鐘以充分發揮此特質
UI_trait_moredesc_needtosetanalarmtotake.cn: 每晚设置闹钟以充分发挥此特质

UI_trait_moredesc_nostressfromlootingzom.en: No stress or unhappiness from stripping items from corpses
UI_trait_moredesc_nostressfromlootingzom.ch: 從屍體上搜刮物品不會產生壓力或不悅
UI_trait_moredesc_nostressfromlootingzom.cn: 从尸体上搜刮物品不会产生压力或不悦

UI_trait_moredesc_outofshapegainconditio.en: Gained if Fitness goes below level %1
UI_trait_moredesc_outofshapegainconditio.ch: 體格降到 %1 級以下時獲得
UI_trait_moredesc_outofshapegainconditio.cn: 体格降到 %1 级以下时获得

UI_trait_moredesc_outofshapeloseconditio.en: Can be lost by training Fitness to level %1
UI_trait_moredesc_outofshapeloseconditio.ch: 將體格練到 %1 級可移除
UI_trait_moredesc_outofshapeloseconditio.cn: 将体格练到 %1 级可移除

UI_trait_moredesc_outofshapeloseconditio.en: Replaced by Unfit if Fitness goes below level %1
UI_trait_moredesc_outofshapeloseconditio.ch: 體格低於 %1 級時會被「身體很差」取代
UI_trait_moredesc_outofshapeloseconditio.cn: 体格低于 %1 级时会被“身体很差”取代

UI_trait_moredesc_panicexceptnightterror.en: %1% panic, except for night terrors and phobias
UI_trait_moredesc_panicexceptnightterror.ch: %1% 恐慌（夜驚與恐懼症除外）
UI_trait_moredesc_panicexceptnightterror.cn: %1% 恐慌（夜惊与恐惧症除外）

UI_trait_moredesc_raweggsnevercausefoodi.en: Raw eggs never cause food illness
UI_trait_moredesc_raweggsnevercausefoodi.ch: 生雞蛋絕不會導致食物中毒
UI_trait_moredesc_raweggsnevercausefoodi.cn: 生鸡蛋绝不会导致食物中毒

UI_trait_moredesc_reducedvisoinconemalus.en: Reduced vision cone malus in the darkness
UI_trait_moredesc_reducedvisoinconemalus.ch: 黑暗中的視野錐懲罰降低
UI_trait_moredesc_reducedvisoinconemalus.cn: 黑暗中的视野锥惩罚降低

UI_trait_moredesc_replacedbyemaciatedifw.en: Replaced by Emaciated if weight goes below %1
UI_trait_moredesc_replacedbyemaciatedifw.ch: 體重低於 %1 時會變為「瘦骨嶙峋」
UI_trait_moredesc_replacedbyemaciatedifw.cn: 体重低于 %1 时会变为“瘦骨嶙峋”

UI_trait_moredesc_replacedbyfeebleatleve.en: Replaced by Feeble when reaching level %1 Strength
UI_trait_moredesc_replacedbyfeebleatleve.ch: 力量達到 %1 級時會變為「身體虛弱」
UI_trait_moredesc_replacedbyfeebleatleve.cn: 力量达到 %1 级时会变为“身体虚弱”

UI_trait_moredesc_replacedbyobeseifweigh.en: Replaced by Obese if weight goes above %1
UI_trait_moredesc_replacedbyobeseifweigh.ch: 體重超過 %1 時會變為「身肥體胖」
UI_trait_moredesc_replacedbyobeseifweigh.cn: 体重超过 %1 时会变为“身肥体胖”

UI_trait_moredesc_replacedbyoverweightif.en: Replaced by High Weight if weight goes below %1
UI_trait_moredesc_replacedbyoverweightif.ch: 體重低於 %1 時會變為「體重過重」
UI_trait_moredesc_replacedbyoverweightif.cn: 体重低于 %1 时会变为“体重过重”

UI_trait_moredesc_replacedbystrongatleve.en: Replaced by Strong when reaching level %1 Strength
UI_trait_moredesc_replacedbystrongatleve.ch: 力量達到 %1 級時會變為「身強力壯」
UI_trait_moredesc_replacedbystrongatleve.cn: 力量达到 %1 级时会变为“身强力壮”

UI_trait_moredesc_replacedbyunderweighti.en: Replaced by Low Weight if weight goes above %1
UI_trait_moredesc_replacedbyunderweighti.ch: 體重超過 %1 時會變為「體重過輕」
UI_trait_moredesc_replacedbyunderweighti.cn: 体重超过 %1 时会变为“体重过轻”

UI_trait_moredesc_replacedbyveruunderwei.en: Replaced by Very Low Weight if weight goes above %1
UI_trait_moredesc_replacedbyveruunderwei.ch: 體重超過 %1 時會變為「身形消瘦」
UI_trait_moredesc_replacedbyveruunderwei.cn: 体重超过 %1 时会变为“身形消瘦”

UI_trait_moredesc_replacedbyveryunderwei.en: Replaced by Very Low Weight if weight goes below %1
UI_trait_moredesc_replacedbyveryunderwei.ch: 體重低於 %1 時會變為「身形消瘦」
UI_trait_moredesc_replacedbyveryunderwei.cn: 体重低于 %1 时会变为“身形消瘦”

UI_trait_moredesc_runningsprintingendura.en: %1% running/sprinting endurance loss from the trait itself
UI_trait_moredesc_runningsprintingendura.ch: %1% 由此特質造成的奔跑/衝刺耐力消耗
UI_trait_moredesc_runningsprintingendura.cn: %1% 由该特质造成的奔跑/冲刺耐力消耗

UI_trait_moredesc_slightlyincreasedropcl.ch: 略微提升攀爬繩索的速度
UI_trait_moredesc_slightlyincreasedropcl.cn: 略微提升攀爬绳索的速度

UI_trait_moredesc_soundeffectsmuffled.en: Some sound effects will be muffled.
UI_trait_moredesc_soundeffectsmuffled.ch: 部分音效會變得沉悶模糊。
UI_trait_moredesc_soundeffectsmuffled.cn: 部分音效会变得沉闷模糊。

UI_trait_moredesc_stillabletowatchtv.en: Still able to watch TV due to closed captions.
UI_trait_moredesc_stillabletowatchtv.ch: 由於有字幕，仍然可以看電視。
UI_trait_moredesc_stillabletowatchtv.cn: 由于有字幕，仍然可以看电视。

UI_trait_moredesc_stillcantgoabovemovesp.en: (Still can't go above the move speed cap)

UI_trait_moredesc_stressfromlootingcorps.en: %1% stress and unhappiness from stripping items from corpses
UI_trait_moredesc_stressfromlootingcorps.ch: %1% 從屍體上搜刮物品時的壓力與不悅
UI_trait_moredesc_stressfromlootingcorps.cn: %1% 从尸体上搜刮物品时的压力与不悦

UI_trait_moredesc_tirednesslossratewhile.ch: %1% 清醒時的疲勞增加速度
UI_trait_moredesc_tirednesslossratewhile.cn: %1% 清醒时的疲劳增加速度

UI_trait_moredesc_tirednessrecoveryratew.ch: %1% 睡眠時的疲勞恢復速度
UI_trait_moredesc_tirednessrecoveryratew.cn: %1% 睡眠时的疲劳恢复速度

UI_trait_moredesc_unfitgaincondition.en: Gained if Fitness is below level %1
UI_trait_moredesc_unfitgaincondition.ch: 體格低於 %1 級時獲得
UI_trait_moredesc_unfitgaincondition.cn: 体格低于 %1 级时获得

UI_trait_moredesc_unfitlosecondition.en: Can become Out of Shape by training Fitness to level %1
UI_trait_moredesc_unfitlosecondition.ch: 將體格練到 %1 級可轉變為「身體不好」
UI_trait_moredesc_unfitlosecondition.cn: 将体格练到 %1 级可转变为“身体不好”

UI_trait_moredesc_weaponsightsrangebonus.en: Weapon sights' bonus range are always at minimum value
UI_trait_moredesc_weaponsightsrangebonus.ch: 武器瞄具的加成射程永遠為最小值
UI_trait_moredesc_weaponsightsrangebonus.cn: 武器瞄具的加成射程始终为最小值

UI_trait_moredesc_windpenaltywhenaimingw.en: %1% wind penalty when aiming with guns
UI_trait_moredesc_windpenaltywhenaimingw.ch: %1% 槍械瞄準時的風力懲罰
UI_trait_moredesc_windpenaltywhenaimingw.cn: %1% 枪械瞄准时的风力惩罚

UI_trait_moredesc_xpforallskillsexcept.en: %1% xp for all skills, except Fitness and Strength
UI_trait_moredesc_xpforallskillsexcept.ch: %1% 所有技能經驗（體能與力量除外）
UI_trait_moredesc_xpforallskillsexcept.cn: %1% 所有技能经验（健身与力量除外）

UI_trait_moredesc_xpforweaponskillsandai.en: %1% XP for all weapon skills and Aiming skill
UI_trait_moredesc_xpforweaponskillsandai.ch: 所有武器技能與瞄準技能經驗值 %1%
UI_trait_moredesc_xpforweaponskillsandai.cn: 所有武器技能与瞄准技能经验值 %1%

UI_trait_moredesc_zombiesbehindvisibleea.en: Zombies approaching from behind will be visible much earlier
UI_trait_moredesc_zombiesbehindvisibleea.ch: 從背後接近的殭屍會提早許多被發現
UI_trait_moredesc_zombiesbehindvisibleea.cn: 从背后接近的丧尸会提前很多被发现

UI_trait_moredesc_zombiesbehindvisiblela.en: Zombies approaching from behind will be visible later
UI_trait_moredesc_zombiesbehindvisiblela.ch: 從背後接近的殭屍會較晚被發現
UI_trait_moredesc_zombiesbehindvisiblela.cn: 从背后接近的丧尸会更晚被发现

UI_trait_unluckydesc.en:
What could go wrong for you, often does.
-10% chance to find rare loot.
+5% chance of failing item repairs.
UI_trait_unluckydesc.ch:
會出錯的事，往往真的會發生在你身上。
找到稀有戰利品的機率 -10%。
修理物品失敗的機率 +5%。
UI_trait_unluckydesc.cn:
会出错的事，往往真的会发生在你身上。
找到稀有战利品的几率 -10%。
修理物品失败的几率 +5%。
